docket_entries.description: REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD BY MAIL SUBMITTED BY PLANTIFF

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-28-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-07-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ROCIO GUARDADO IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT GERADO HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE PROOF OF SERVICE. ADDRES FOR DEFENDANT IN IJS IS CONFIRMED BY DEFENDANT TO BE HIS CORRECT ADDRESS. ALL PARTIES PRESENT ARE MADE AWARE OF THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUARDADO, ROCIO
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUARDADO, ROCIO
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 7, 2021 AT 1:30 P.M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUARDADO, ROCIO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-07-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-07-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ROCIO GUARDADO IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT GERADO HERNANDEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-07-2021 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUARDADO, ROCIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, GERADO $1,270.16 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,270.16 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GUARDADO, ROCIO AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, GERADO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-28-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUARDADO, ROCIO AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, GERADO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00) SERVED AUG-31-2021, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, GERADO
